title: clematis papillosa
intro: Clematis papillosa, also known as the hairy clematis, is a perennial flowering plant native to China. The roots and flowers of the plant have been used in traditional Chinese medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Clematis papillosa include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used to treat a variety of health conditions, including bronchitis and pneumonia.
